overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking along a forested river bank on a sunny day. The player approaches a waterfall, views it from various angles, and continues along the rocky shoreline through dense woodland terrain.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the grassy river bank, navigating between pine trees and observing the flowing water

entered.detail: calm flowing river with visible current and reflections
dense coniferous trees lining the river bank
large boulder partially submerged in the river
grass-covered slope along the walking path

segments.scene_description: Walking along a forested river bank with tall pine trees lining the path. The river flows calmly on the right with large boulders visible in the water. The terrain is grassy with patches of dirt as the camera moves steadily forward through the natural landscape.

events.description: waterfall becomes visible through the trees ahead, marking the transition to the waterfall area

agents.ego_description: approaching the waterfall while walking along the rocky river edge, observing the cascading water and mist

entered.detail: multi-tiered waterfall cascading down rocky cliff face
steep rocky cliff surrounding the waterfall
spray and mist rising from the base of the falls
calm pool of water at the base of the waterfall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to reveal a waterfall cascading down a rocky cliff face. Mist rises from the pool at the base as the camera approaches through the trees. The surrounding area is dense with vegetation and large boulders, with the sound of rushing water becoming prominent.

events.description: passing the waterfall and continuing along the river bend, moving away from the falls

agents.ego_description: moving past the waterfall and continuing along the rocky river bank, examining the rapids and shoreline

entered.detail: fast-moving water flowing over submerged rocks
rocky terrain along the water's edge with loose stones
sunlit rocky cliff rising above the river

segments.scene_description: Having passed the waterfall, the camera continues along the rocky shoreline. The river flows over stones creating small rapids, with the waterfall now visible in the background to the right. The terrain becomes rockier with sparse vegetation as the path continues upstream through the forested valley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a forested river bank that leads toward a cascading waterfall and continues into a rocky upstream valley. It begins by moving steadily forward through a landscape of tall pine trees and grassy patches, with a calm river and large boulders flowing to the right. As the camera pushes through the dense vegetation, the view opens up to reveal a waterfall cascading down a rocky cliff face with mist rising from the pool below. The scene then shifts as the camera passes the falls and follows the rocky shoreline, where the river transforms into small rapids. Finally, the terrain becomes increasingly stony and sparse as the path continues upstream through the forested valley with the waterfall receding into the background.
